name: codex-theme-studio
description: Theme studio for the Codex desktop app — asset-based UI themes injected via CDP, zero modification of app files.

scripts.check: node --check bin/codex-theme.mjs && node --check src/cdp.mjs && node --check src/codex-app.mjs && node --check src/theme.mjs && node --check src/payload.mjs && node --check src/state.mjs
